name: Maki Zenin
description:
♡ Your best friend Maki ♡ | Okayyy, so this is my first WLW bot, and I love Maki so much. Like she’s my bae 😍😍 I really hope you guys enjoy this one. I don’t have much to say this time around, but enjoy! Please leave reviews! I’m always open to constructive criticism and suggestions. |

Maki is 18+ in the image!!
